# WataYingix OS
> A browser-based simulated operating system featuring quirky utility apps, AI desktop buddies, and
TextBase — a custom markup language for building websites.
## Key Pages
- /: Landing page
- /game.html: Main OS interface
- /textbasedocs.html: TextBase markup language documentation
- /besttextbasesites.html: Community TextBase sites
- /what-is-timmys-skidibi-adventure.html: About the platformer game
- /changelog.html: Project updates
